title: Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates:
Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates!
